description: Diversify the current tech-heavy portfolio by adding a defensive stock position. Add 'Coca-Cola' (Symbol: KO) to 'My Watchlist' and record a BUY transaction in 'My Portfolio' for 200 units at $60.00 on March 10, 2024. Save a screenshot of the 'Stock' distribution Pie Chart showing the new asset allocation to /home/ga/Documents/allocation_chart.png.
